mapper.sql: classify_id, classify_code, classify_name, path, classify_desc, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_lookup_classify_t WHERE classify_code = #{classifyCode} AND (path = #{path} OR (path IS NULL AND #{path} IS NULL))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_lookup_classify_t
AND classify_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{classifyCode}, '%')
AND classify_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{classifyName}, '%')
AND classify_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{classifyDesc}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
